style_effects: Subtle steam curls rise from Charmander's metallic joints, reflecting distorted cityscapes in its polished armor. Glowing blue energy pulses rhythmically along its armor seams, casting sharp, cold light that fractures into prismatic shards. Metallic dust particles swirl in slow motion around its form, catching the eerie blue-white glow. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
